morning_context.market_summary: Broader U.S. equities have recently traded under pressure as oil-price shock risk and geopolitics increased volatility. Recent market coverage shows the S&P 500 below prior highs while the VIX has been in the mid-20s range, consistent with elevated risk premium. In this backdrop, defensive and cash-flow-resilient names are favored over high-beta momentum chases.

MU.technical_setup: Momentum is still positive on a medium-term basis, but post-earnings two-way volatility raises whipsaw risk. Prefer pullback entries over breakout chasing.

risks: Memory pricing cycle concerns despite strong quarter
